zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet於從大約0988年到1020年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙特費奎特時，他的父親de Gernoun56歲，母親de Montfichet53歲。他與Agnes O'Connor結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1118年之後在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet于从大约0988年到1020年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯蒙特費奎特时，他的父亲de Gernoun56岁，母亲de Montfichet53岁。他与Agnes O'Connor结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1118年之后在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Gernoun,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet was born from about 0988 to 1020, in Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, de Gernoun, was 56 and his mother, de Montfichet, was 53. He married Agnes O'Connor. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1118, in Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet est né du environ 0988 au 1020, à Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, de Gernoun, avait 56 ans et sa mère, de Montfichet, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Agnes O'Connor. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1118, à Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet von um 0988 bis 1020 in Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater de Gernoun 56 und seine Mutter de Montfichet 53. Er hat Agnes O'Connor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1118 in Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet è nato il da circa 0988 a 1020 nel Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, de Gernoun, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, de Montfichet, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Agnes O'Connor. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1118, nel Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichetがから約0988年まで1020年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスモントフィクエトで生まれた時，父de Gernounは56歳，母de Montfichetは53歳であった。Agnes O'Connorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1118年以後にイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet(이)가 대략 0988년 부터 1020년 까지 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 몽피크트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 de Gernoun(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 de Montfichet(은)는 53세였다. 그는 Agnes O'Connor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1118년 이후 영국 에세스에서 사망했다.

lv.estimated between 988 and 1020–after 111: no ap 0988. gada līdz 1020. gadam–pēc 1118. gada

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet nasceu de aproximadamente 0988 a 1020, em Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, de Gernoun, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, de Montfichet, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes O'Connor. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1118, em Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet родился с около 0988 по 1020 в местности монтфикует, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени de Gernoun было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали de Montfichet, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes O'Connor. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1118 г. в местности эссекс, Англия.

sm.estimated between 988 and 1020–after 111: mai le e tusa o le 0988 e o'o I le 1020–ina ua ma'ea le 1118

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Gernoun, Baron de Montfichet nació desde aproximadamente 0988 hasta 1020, en Montfiquet, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, de Gernoun, tenía 56 años y su mamá, de Montfichet, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Agnes O'Connor. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1118, en Essex, Inglaterra.
